description: Fragment of a Hebrew legal document from Cairo dated 1771/2 CE ([5]532 AM) certifying that Yaʿaqov Katāḥ (?) b. Avraham ______[lacuna] and Me'ir Saporte/Saporti(?) b. Afidah (?) have completely settled their accounts with each other. Much of the document deals with Yaʿaqov's wages (שכירותו), perhaps from a prior partnership between the two men. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
